name: O-3 plugin lifecycle: uninstall-cleanup without --confirm yes does not delete and reports what would be removed
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && printf 'data\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/cache/x.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -d .claude-tdd-pro/cache ] && grep -q 'would remove' err.txt && echo would_remove 1>&2
